creator: freebsd-pr@brettglass.com
text:
The "djbdns" port does not install the "jumbo" patch -- which contains many features that are necessary to system adminstrators -- even when it is checked during the build process. The patch is downloaded into /usr/ports/distfiles, but then is never unzipped into the "files" directory or applied to the source.

How-To-Repeat: Install the port, selecting the "jumbo" patch. It will be downloaded into /usr/ports/distfiles but never unzipped or applied.
